data.body: Ported in 0a3ed506: archive with idempotency (.archived marker / ARCHIVED event), open-only status gate via shared reducer, ARCHIVED event through the seam + marker write + confirmation line. Exact-arity pinned via registry max_args. Dual-run green bash AND python on all four archive suites (subcommand 9, archived 6, exclusion-e2e 15, eligibility 13); library parity tests added. Default stays bash.
